package rulecoverage

func NegativeUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCount() string {
    ruleID := "unbuffered_channel_for_known_producer_count"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "unbuffered channels `make(chan T)` when the number of producers/messages is known at construction time"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
